review_body_text: Very happy because all the colleagues very sporting and friendly. Manager very fun and friendly person who like help their team to achieve the target if they have target to achieve
I work in the sale department about 1 year plus from December 2018 to June 2020 in Penang. Overall okay but could have been better. Good for graduate trainess or freshie.
evrything is good not the best but good enough. normal stress only if customer difficult colleague is really helpful and kind with each other could improve payment

Great benefits and staff perks for housing or personal loans. Sometimes the job can be challenging but visibility depends on how you shine to top management. If your top management changes every year keep doing the same until someone recognizes you for the talent you are

Once you jump in Sales. you need to have strong mentality. U will be in so much pressure and once u achieved their expectation they will expect more. A very good company. A place to learn what is work about, how to deal with customers, improve ourselves to be good multitasking, friendship with staff , they know how to appreciate staff based on the performance. non performing pressure always be there.
pros_text: Flexible time, as long you get the figure

review_title: Fun workplace and good for fresh
review_body_text: Good for fresh graduate, work in office learned financial skill and analysis finance management good workplace culture Many advisor from senior that most enjoyable part of the job
Need to work fast & accurate. For those you are in Sales position, the monthly & yearly target is the most important & priority in order to survive. Always keep up to date the product feature.

review_title: Overall rating is good. Work life in this company is fun and can learn a lot of things
review_body_text: Overall rating is good. Work life in this company is fun and can learn a lot of things. I work in sales position, which sometimes allow us to work from home. The only sad things is the management, there is no clear guidelines who to take responsible in certain issues, which would cause chaos. Good salary given based on your job position and efforts. It is really recommended for fresh graduate and whoever looking for a good-pay company. Work life balance, benefits/compensation is good for employees.
Low salary, stressful but fun working with colleagues. Heavy workload. Low work life balance. Health care benefits are good. Especially maternity and paternity leaves.

A lot of new things to be learned. Nice team and competitive. Need improvement for the Kpi target follow branch and area to be balance follow demographic structure. In addition, for achievers need to be complimented for permanent position.

review_title: Good experience, many training provided for staffs
review_body_text: Good company & benefits are tip top especially on medical. Very tough job for work life balance i would say. But win win situation once you are compensated with bonuses & increment. The job culture was the best so far.

I love working at CIMB because of the working enviroment. The management is very care about their staff. But it quiet pressure when it come to achieve monthly performance target. We need to work extra time every end of month.
my best working experience ever! colleagues helps me a lot through out my journey there good leader reflected in my team leader and my HoD work life balance for me

review_title: I want to work again- just for the commision
review_body_text: can give best employer award. staff benefit tip top. Staff the best. their strategy and direction is clear. Just u will be in so much pressure and once u achieved their expectation they will expect more. very good company. regret left the company. A place to learn what is work about, friendship, staff welfare, they know how to appreciate staff based on the performance. non performing pressure always be there. but so far very understanding management(RD's, Branch Managers).
pros_text: remuneration- commissions, medical benefits, staff loans etc
cons_text: target based on salary, multiple products. KPI

review_body_text: Managers and people are generally friendly. But work may not be too challenging. I would encourage people to join if you don't want too big of a challenge.
Good place for your to start to gain experience. Very low increment. Hard to job other departments or get promoted. Working are friendly. There is no work life balance. Hard to get leaves
pros_text: Nothing to share at this moment
cons_text: No mc will effect your KPI

review_body_text: Love to work at CIMB, people here are friendly However, there is some cons in the whole recruitment process. Hope CIMB can improve employee experience

only care about management level people. they can simply terminate your contract even for small issue. just because you are only contract. 2 years there with contract position and they are not going to make u permanent. don't mess with your supervisor

Every team in the same department will only take care of their own things, drew lines among the teams. You can only pray when you face issues. On top the bosses there have no time to guide you along with their business meeting timelines. Increment and bonuses are slim.

review_title: i love the medical card benefit.
review_body_text: Company provide many benefit for medical card. fun working environment. encounter new people everyday. Met a lots of customer. good chance to know a lot of people and I feel so good.
